title: grumilea crispipila
intro: Grumilea crispipila, also known as the Rough-leaved Grumilea or Grumilea, is a plant species that belongs to the family Lamiaceae. Traditionally, Grumilea crispipila has been used in medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including the treatment of fever, colds, and coughs, as well as its potential anti-cancer properties. Grumilea crispipila is often prepared as an infusion or decoction for its medicinal uses, and it is also used in traditional herbal preparations, such as tinctures and ointments.
